realm.name: T2IAA_M
realm.description: User who is in charge of defining and changing the onboarding procedure itself, like setting up the mandatory documents and the rules that will be followed by the onboarding process.

realm.name: Ro-MU-CA
realm.description: Role defined in XFSC Federated Catalogue: Catalogue Administrator

realm.name: Ro-SD-A
realm.description: Role defined in XFSC Federated Catalogue: Self-Description Administrator

realm.name: T1UAR_M
realm.description: Tier 1 user and roles manager. This role will manage local roles and dataspace identity attributes (defining them and assigning them to participant types  defining their assignability)

realm.name: APPLICANT
realm.description: End user manages onboarding requests for dataspace participants signing up via the public dataspace onboarding site. His/Her role is to create onboarding  requests and respond to Tier 2 (NOTARY) authorization interactions to ensure approval.

realm.name: IATTR_M
realm.description: This role is present only in the Dataspace Governance Authority and its duties are to cover the whole lifecycle of Identity Attributes, from the creation and management to the assignment to participants

realm.name: NOTARY
realm.description: Tier 2 authorisation operator, the one who is in charge of taking care of onboarding requests and follow their process. It will ask for further documents, it will comment on the onboarding requests, and reject/approve the requests

realm.name: ONBOARDER_M
realm.description: Tier 2 setup administrator role, the one who is in charge of finalising the tier 2 setup of an agent installation

realm.name: GA_SCHEMA_ADMIN
realm.description: Schema Manager Admin, Tier-1 Role for Schema Admin

realm.name: GA_SCHEMA_VIEWER
realm.description: Schema Manager Viewer, Tier-1 Role for Schema Viewer

realm.name: KIBANA_BUSINESS_USER
realm.description: Kibana Business User, Role for accessing Kibana as a business user (binded to local Kibana user)

realm.name: KIBANA_ADMIN
realm.description: Kibana Admin, Role for accessing Kibana as an admin (binded to local Kibana user)

clientScopes.name: roles
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add user roles to the access token

clientScopes.name: acr
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add acr (authentication context class reference) to the token

clientScopes.name: web-origins
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add allowed web origins to the access token
